issues.description: First effect missing LeaderHasType condition to check for {Impel Down} type leader, which is required by the effect text 'If your Leader has the {Impel Down} type'
TrashFromHand action has incorrect filter specifying cardType 'Event', but the effect text says 'trash 2 cards from your hand' without any type restriction
TrashFromHand should specify count: 2 to match 'trash 2 cards from your hand'
DrawCard action should specify 'upTo: true' to match 'draw up to 2 cards' rather than drawing exactly 2
Second effect with Trigger appears to be for the [Trigger] ability, which should draw 1 card typically, but draws 2 here. Verify if this card has a printed [Trigger] ability
